title: alyssum calycinum subsp. granatense
intro: Alyssum calycinum subsp. granatense, also known as the Granat Alyssum, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Alyssum calycinum subsp. granatense include its ability to reduce stress and promote relaxation, as well as its potential to act as an antioxidant and antimicrobial agent. In traditional herbal medicine, the plant is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
